summary: Read-only plan for the audio-native support cluster. #90642 remains the best non-security canonical issue for the normal model-turn native audio content gap. #35835 is related but not a duplicate because it targets read-tool audio attachment handling. Security-sensitive refs are routed item-by-item to central security handling without blocking non-security classification.
